parityMeta.describes: PA-S7 (PA-1a) rollbackAdjustment function-level parity — synthetic ProgramAdjustmentHistoryItems pinning restoredTemplateId (= sourceProgramTemplateId), restoredProgramTemplate = cloneProgram(sourceProgramSnapshot) (= S2 clone) or undefined when absent, and updatedHistoryItem = { ...historyItem, status:'rolled_back', rollbackAvailable:false, rolledBackAt:<injected now> } with the _unknown open bag carried through. Covers with-snapshot (clone returned), no-snapshot (restoredProgramTemplate null), and an explicit per-case injected clock that overwrites a present rolledBackAt plus effectReview/open-bag passthrough. Generated from src/engines/programAdjustmentEngine.ts; the wall-clock field (the only new Date() read, ts:934) is substituted by the injected clock; the Swift port takes nowIso explicitly and canonical-asserts.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: rollbackAdjustment reads new Date() once for rolledBackAt; the generator substitutes that single field with the injected deterministicClockIso (or the case-level now) so the golden is byte-deterministic. All items are synthetic (no email/token; userId values use the allowlisted synthetic-user / local-user placeholders).

cases.label: rollbackAdjustment: with sourceProgramSnapshot → restoredProgramTemplate = clone(snapshot); status applied→rolled_back; open-bag passthrough

legacyClientField.note: future field preserved via open bag

cases.label: rollbackAdjustment: explicit per-case injected now (≠ meta default) overwrites a present rolledBackAt; effectReview + open-bag passthrough
